• PageSpeed Insights - Online tool that measures the performance of a page for mobile devices and desktop devices. It fetches the url twice, once with a mobile user-agent, and once with a desktop-user agent.

• PSIstars3.1k - Node module for PageSpeed Insights reporting as part of your build process. Use directly with Gulp or use grunt-pagespeedstars464 if a Grunt user. For local testing, a write-up using this task and ngrok is available.

• UnCSSstars9.3k removes unused CSS from pages, allowing you to reduce the global CSS you may need to load in for your site. Tasks are available for Gruntstars3.9k, Gulpstars961 and other build tools.
